_comment: v0.1.0 — hooks are intentionally minimal. The SessionStart hook below logs a single line confirming Astrocyte is wired but does NOT auto-capture conversation turns into memory. Auto-capture (UserPromptSubmit, Stop, PreCompact) is planned for v0.2 once the MCP server gains a streaming /retain endpoint that can ingest dialog without an LLM round-trip per turn. Until then, retain is explicit — the SKILL.md teaches the agent when to call memory_retain.
